lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: Have you completed your task yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did I have to do again?

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: There's a crate ready to be loaded onto the ship. If you could fill it up with bananas, I'll pay you 30 gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, the crate isn't full yet...

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: Well come back when it is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where are these bananas going to be delivered to?

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: I sell them to Wydin who runs a grocery store in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've filled a crate with bananas.

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: Well done, here's your payment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will you pay me for another crate full?

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: Yes certainly.

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: If you go outside you should see the old crate has been loaded on to the ship, and there is another empty crate in its place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you, I'll be on my way.

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: Hello I'm Luthas, I run the banana plantation here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you offer me employment on your plantation?

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: Yes, I can sort something out. There's a crate ready to be loaded onto the ship.

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: You wouldn't believe the demand for bananas from Wydin's shop over in Port Sarim. I think this is the third crate I've shipped him this month..

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: If you could fill it up with bananas, I'll pay you 30 gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That customs officer is annoying isn't she?

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: Well I know her pretty well. She doesn't cause me any trouble any more.

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: She doesn't even search my export crates any more. She knows they only contain bananas.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? How interesting. Whereabouts do you send those to?

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: There is a little shop over in Port Sarim that buys them up by the crate. I believe it is run by a man called Wydin.

lines.speaker: Luthas
lines.text: Congratulations.
